details: The emergency department is experiencing a temporary closure due to a sudden gap in physician coverage. During this closure, nursing staff will remain on-site to provide basic first aid, assessment, and triage to any walk-in patients.
alternativeCare: In an emergency, dial 911. Walk-in patients requiring emergency services should present to Raymond Health Centre (60 km away) or Chinook Regional Hospital in Lethbridge (85 km away).

details: Due to ongoing vacancy and recruiting challenges, the Emergency Department at Boyle Healthcare Centre will be temporarily closed daily between 8:00 PM and 8:00 AM. It will continue to operate regularly during daytime hours (8:00 AM to 8:00 PM).
alternativeCare: For after-hours emergency services, please go to Athabasca Healthcare Centre (40 km away) or George McDougall - Smoky Lake Healthcare Centre (74 km away). Call Health Link at 811 for non-urgent health advice.

details: Obstetrical delivery services are temporarily suspended. Pregnant patients are being contacted directly by their prenatal providers to ensure safe alternative delivery plans are arranged at nearby regional hospitals.
alternativeCare: Expectant mothers requiring active delivery care should present to Red Deer Regional Hospital Centre (85 km away). For non-emergent advisory services, consult your local practitioner or call Health Link at 811.

details: Sylvan Lake Advanced Ambulatory Care Service (SLAACS) will temporarily close early at 3:00 PM instead of its regular 10:00 PM closing time on June 27 and June 29, 2026. This is due to an unavoidable physician schedule vacancy.
alternativeCare: Patients seeking urgent or advanced ambulatory care after 3:00 PM should go to the Red Deer Regional Hospital Centre or Rocky Mountain House Health Centre. In emergencies, dial 911.

details: The Slave Lake Emergency Department experienced a temporary 24-hour closure due to a gap in locum coverage. Full services were restored on schedule.
alternativeCare: During the closure, patients were redirected to High Prairie Health Complex or Boyle Healthcare Centre.

details: The Emergency Department remains temporarily closed due to long-term chronic nursing shortages. Long-term care, laboratory, and diagnostic imaging services remain operational at the facility.
alternativeCare: Access emergency medical services at Coronation Hospital and Care Centre (50 km away) or Provost Health Centre (80 km away). Call 911 in emergencies.

details: St. Theresa General Hospital has implemented a temporary reduction of 10 acute care beds due to nursing vacancies. The Emergency Department, long-term care, and public health remain fully open and unaffected.
alternativeCare: No immediate patient action is required. Inpatients requiring intensive acute care may be transferred to High Level General Hospital if capacity limits are reached.

details: Temporary 3-day closure of the Emergency Department at Hardisty Health Centre. Full services were restored on schedule following locum coverage arrival.
alternativeCare: Walk-in patients were directed to Killam Health Centre (20 km away) during the disruption.

details: The Elk Point Emergency Department will temporarily close overnight between 7:00 PM and 7:00 AM daily. It is fully operational during daytime hours (7:00 AM to 7:00 PM).
alternativeCare: For overnight emergencies, please present to St. Therese - St. Paul Healthcare Centre (35 km away) or Bonnyville Healthcare Centre (60 km away). In an emergency, dial 911.

details: The Emergency Department will remain closed overnight from 7:00 PM to 7:00 AM daily due to long-term clinical nursing vacancies. Daylight hours remain fully open.
alternativeCare: After-hours patients should seek emergency care at Whitecourt Healthcare Centre (80 km away) or Slave Lake Healthcare Centre (115 km away).

details: The emergency department experienced a temporary holiday closure over the Christmas long weekend due to physician vacancies.
alternativeCare: Emergency medical services were routed through Lethbridge during this period.

details: Airdrie Urgent Care Centre closed temporarily overnight on Friday, Saturday, and Sunday from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM due to physician schedule shortages.
alternativeCare: Patients were advised to seek care at Foothills Medical Centre or Peter Lougheed Centre in Calgary during overnight hours.
